---
title: "Contact"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

[{{< fa solid envelope >}}]{style="display: none;"}

```{=html}
<div id="contact-cards">

<div class="contact-card">
  <div class="icon">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i>
  </div>
  <h3>General Enquiries</h3>
  <p>For questions about our training programmes, events, or consultation services:</p>
  <a href="mailto:research-digital-skills@york.ac.uk">research-digital-skills@york.ac.uk</a>
</div>

<div class="contact-card">
  <div class="icon">
    <i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin"></i>
  </div>
  <h3>LinkedIn</h3>
  <p>Follow us for event updates, training opportunities, and community news:</p>
  <a href="https://uk.linkedin.com/company/ukri-digital-research-skills-catalyst" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">UKRI Digital Research Skills Catalyst</a>
</div>

<div class="contact-card">
  <div class="icon">
    <i class="fa-brands fa-bluesky"></i>
  </div>
  <h3>Bluesky</h3>
  <p>Connect with us on Bluesky for the latest updates:</p>
  <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/ukriskillscatalyst.bsky.social" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">@ukriskillscatalyst.bsky.social</a>
</div>

</div>
```
